mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_post (user_id, title, content, type, path_id, chapter_id, level_id, likes, comments, views, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{pathId}, #{chapterId}, #{levelId}, 0, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE community_post SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE community_post SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_comment (post_id, user_id, content, parent_id, likes, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE community_comment SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ( SELECT user_id FROM community_post WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) UNION SELECT user_id FROM community_comment WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ) AS active_users
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE DATE(create_time) = DATE(NOW())

SELECT CASE type WHEN 'discussion' THEN '讨论' WHEN 'question' THEN '问答' WHEN 'share' THEN '分享' ELSE IFNULL(type, '其他') END AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM community_post GROUP BY type ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
